subcodes.first_line: My Supreme Pen beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the Most High, the Most Exalted, and that thou hast turned toward Mine all-glorious horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد قلمی الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو العلی الاعلی و بانک اقبلت الی افقی الابهی و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
